items.title: Louth v Mayo: The sideline battle
‘It would be weird not to show the sex’: Kit Connor and Joe Locke on Heartstopper’s queer teen curtain call
items.summary: As Netflix’s quietly radical coming-of-age drama wraps up with a feature-length film, its stars discuss queer escapism, awkward love scenes and letting go of the characters that made themIn a house near Maidenhead in Berkshire, a group of sweaty teenagers are throwing a party. Vodka bottles line the staircase, snogs are shared on lumpy sofas and gossip is exchanged. The windows are covered with multicoloured fabrics to ward off prying eyes.

items.title: I sail the world in a replica 10th-century Viking longboat
items.summary: Every year I spend six to eight weeks on board – it has brought new friendships and showed me how generous people can beWhen I was a teenager in Denmark in the 1980s, my older brother drove me to Roskilde, a city with five original Viking ships. We started working with the Viking Ship Museum of Roskilde as volunteers to build one of the first replicas.

items.title: ‘Music was my first desire’: Anthony Hopkins releases his debut single
items.summary: Hollywood actor signs recording deal with Decca after decades of composing pieces inspired by his Welsh childhoodAnthony Hopkins says he has achieved his “first desire” of signing a record deal, with his debut single being released on Friday.The 88-year-old Hollywood actor’s first album, Life Is a Dream, will be released next month by Decca Classics .

items.title: Gurriers at The Button Factory, Dublin
items.summary: The post Gurriers at The Button Factory, Dublin appeared first on Goldenplec.com Gurriers at The Button Factory, Dublin on Friday December 19th, 2026 Gurriers, the last diamond to be forged from Ireland’s post-punk scene before the mine collapsed, played two sold-out shows in The Button Factory this week on a landmark occasion for a group who have outgrown their sweaty club origins.

items.title: Kingfishr at 3Arena, Dublin
items.summary: The post Kingfishr at 3Arena, Dublin appeared first on Goldenplec.com   Kingfishr at 3Arena, Dublin on December 18th 2025 One of the most anticipated concerts of the year occurred on an absolutely freezing Thursday night, with Kingfishr taking the stage of the 3arena for the first of their two sold out shows.

items.title: Court Refuses Trump’s Request To Put His Name Back on Kennedy Center
items.summary: The appeals court ruled that the argument by the president's team that the Kennedy Center will lose money without Trump's name was bogus. Court Refuses Trump’s Request To Put His Name Back on Kennedy Center Travis Bland

items.title: Elderly people in Walkinstown devastated as crucial day service to be evicted from building
items.summary: Walkinstown Social Service Centre, on Walkinstown Parade in the Dublin 12 suburb, has provided food, activities, and companionship for the area's older population for over 60 years

items.title: Dublin woman to walk length of Ireland to demand better menopause and dual diagnosis care
items.summary: Nikki Murphy, 51, described to Dublin Live years of what she called “being turned away” by services, a late diagnosis of ADHD, and a period in which suicidal thoughts and violent rage left her bedridden for weeks
